withinHours.headline: Expect our call within 10 minutes

beforeHours.headline: We'll call you this morning from 9 AM

beforeHours.timer: Keep your phone on silent-off from 9 AM

afterHours.headline: We'll call you tomorrow morning from 9 AM

callPrep.title: What to expect on the call
callPrep.unknownNumber: The call may show as Unknown or Private — that's us confirming your Skinouva order.
callPrep.whatWeAsk: We'll ask for your delivery address in the UAE and confirm your order details. Takes about 60 seconds.
callPrep.whyAnswer: Answering this call is what unlocks shipping. Most customers who answer receive their order within 2–4 days.
callPrep.ifMiss: If we can't reach you, your order may be cancelled to free stock for other customers.

about.headline: About Skinouva
about.body: Skinouva was created to offer a simple, elegant skincare experience for women in the UAE. Instead of crowded routines and confusing choices, we focus on carefully selected serums for clear concerns: dark spots, blemish marks, and uneven-looking tone.
about.missionBody: To offer UAE women a carefully selected serum for each skin concern, with a simple and trustworthy ordering experience.

contact.headline: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question about a product or your order? Send us a message and we will help you choose the right serum.
contact.success: Thank you! We will get back to you soon.

items.a: Yes, cash on delivery is available for all orders within the UAE. No card required.

items.q: How long does UAE delivery take?
items.a: Orders typically arrive within 2-4 business days across the UAE.

items.q: Can I use both serums together?
items.a: Yes, both serums can be used as part of a combined routine. We recommend consulting a specialist for your skin type.

items.q: Which serum should I choose for dark spots?
items.a: The Tranexamic + Niacinamide serum is designed to help with the appearance of dark spots and uneven-looking tone.

items.q: Which serum should I choose for acne marks?
items.a: The Azelaic serum is designed to help with the appearance of post-blemish marks and uneven-looking skin.

items.q: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
items.a: Our products are designed for daily use. If you have very sensitive skin, we recommend starting gradually and observing your skin's reaction.

items.q: When should I expect visible-looking improvement?
items.a: Realistic results require consistency. Look for gradual visible improvement over weeks of regular use, not exaggerated overnight promises.

items.q: What if I entered the wrong phone number?
items.a: Contact us as soon as possible so we can update your order information before shipping.

tranexamic.name: Tranexamic Acid
tranexamic.benefit: Helps support a more even, balanced-looking complexion.

niacinamide.name: Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
niacinamide.benefit: Supports a clearer, smoother-looking skin appearance with regular use.

azelaic.name: Azelaic Acid
azelaic.benefit: Helps support a calmer-looking skin and reduce the appearance of blemish marks.

routine.title: How to Use
routine.morningSteps: Cleanse your skin. Apply the serum. Finish with a moisturiser. Don't forget SPF.
routine.eveningSteps: Cleanse your skin. Apply the serum. Finish with a suitable moisturiser.
routine.consistency: Realistic results require consistency. Use the serum as directed and look for gradual visible improvement over weeks, not exaggerated overnight promises.

guarantee.body: We don't play with words. Use the serum for 30 days. If you don't see a visible reduction in pigmentation, an even skin tone, and a change that your friends and family compliment... message us. We will refund every single dirham. Even if the bottle is completely empty. You carry zero risk.
guarantee.cta: Order Now with Absolute Peace of Mind

productCro.stat: 92% of UAE women suffer from stubborn pigmentation due to intense UV exposure and constant AC.
productCro.painHeadline: You know these struggles well — and why normal creams fail
productCro.painSub: It's not your fault. Most products only treat the dead surface layer, completely ignoring the dark pigment root trapped beneath.

painQuotes.quote: "I spent thousands on laser sessions, and once summer hit, the dark spots came back even worse."
painQuotes.reason: Destroys the skin barrier in our hot climate, triggering Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH).

painQuotes.quote: "My skin gets so oily in Dubai humidity. My makeup melts in 2 hours, exposing all my red and dark marks."
painQuotes.reason: Clogs pores, worsens breakouts, and deepens the appearance of existing dark marks.

painQuotes.quote: "I tried famous, expensive vitamin C serums. They were sticky and did absolutely nothing for my spots."
painQuotes.reason: Oxidizes rapidly in the heat, losing its potency before it can even reach the pigmentation.

productCro.mechanismHeadline: The secret is treating the root, not burning the surface
productCro.mechanismBody: Our formulation does not rely on burning off your skin layers. We use clinical concentrations that penetrate safely to disrupt excess melanin production at its source. Needle-like results, without the needles and zero downtime.
productCro.timelineHeadline: What will you see in the first 30 days?
productCro.timelineSub: Your skin transforms week by week — and your friends will notice before you even say anything.

timeline.title: Hydration & Calmness
timeline.desc: Redness and inflammation subside. Your skin texture feels softer, and makeup glides on perfectly. The skin barrier begins to heal.

timeline.title: Pigment Breakdown
timeline.desc: Dark spots and stubborn acne marks begin to break apart and lighten. You'll notice your face looks 'well-rested' and glowing in the morning.

timeline.title: The Visible Difference
timeline.desc: Now you can compare before & after photos. Uneven tone is drastically reduced, and you'll confidently go out makeup-free. (The 2nd box locks in these results).

productCro.compareSub: Everything you've tried before, and why it hasn't given you the clear skin you deserve.

productCro.noNastiesHeadline: A clean formula that respects your skin
productCro.expertQuote: "Treating pigmentation in the Gulf requires a delicate balance. Aggressive peeling in a high-UV environment damages the skin. Skinouva's approach uses proven ingredients like Tranexamic and Azelaic acid to calmly and safely dismantle pigment, making it the perfect choice for consistent daily use."

climate.headline: Why do your expensive imported brands fail in Dubai?
climate.subheadline: Your routine isn't wrong; it just wasn't built for our environment.

points.title: Intense Gulf UV Rays
points.desc: Hyper-activates melanin production, making dark spots deeper and much harder to fade with standard products.

points.title: A/C & Humidity Shock
points.desc: Moving between freezing A/C and extreme outdoor humidity shatters your skin barrier, causing sudden breakouts and sensitivity.

points.title: Rapid Ingredient Oxidation
points.desc: Standard Vitamin C serums oxidize and lose their potency almost immediately when exposed to transit heat or local humidity.

climate.solution: Skinouva isn't just another skincare brand. We are a derma-cosmetic line utilizing Tranexamic and Azelaic acids—highly heat-stable ingredients perfect for the UAE environment.

collection.headline: Don't buy a product, invest in a result
collection.subheadline: We've selected the most potent clinical ingredients for the deepest skin concerns. No complicated 10-step routines.
collection.bundleBadge: The Smartest Choice for Maximum Results
collection.bundleDesc: Combine the pigment-breaking power of Tranexamic with the texture-smoothing power of Azelaic for a complete AM/PM protocol. Achieve results 3x faster.

authority.headline: Radical Clinical Transparency. No Trade Secrets.
authority.subheadline: We proudly state our active ingredient percentages because we believe in the absolute potency of our formulas.
